actionable_feedback: Obtain and cite the upstream normalization formula if available; if it is unavailable, explicitly document the assumption and include a short justification for the chosen proxy (100 - 2.5 * loss_pct) and any limits of applicability.

Attach an executable reproducibility artifact (script or spreadsheet with explicit formula cells) that regenerates telemetry_loss_analysis.csv from the embedded packet and scalars. Include exact commands to run and expected outputs/hash.
Add column-level / cell-level references (or script line numbers) in reliability_action.md so verifiers can directly map CSV cells to the stated formula and to the script/spreadsheet cells.

Expand sensitivity testing rationale: document why loss_pct is the primary driver and, where relevant, run the same +/-5% perturbation on secondary drivers (packets_sent, packets_received) or explain why they were excluded.

For remediation recommendations, add explicit acceptance criteria (e.g., target loss_pct reduction or target normalized_score per at-risk record) and compute per-record residual risk after the recommended remediation combination (O1+O2).

Resolve the minor workflow metadata inconsistency: clarify deterministic precheck responsibilities vs. model-grader semantic scoring in metadata so verifiers understand where semantic evaluation occurred.
Flag R1 explicitly in the MD with recommended next steps for expert reviewers (what to validate, acceptable margins, and decision threshold sensitivity).
artifact_specific_comments: telemetry_loss_analysis.csv: values and worked calculations match the documented proxy; include a checksum and note the exact script/command used to generate it.
reliability_action.md: documents reconstruction and sensitivity tests clearly but is truncated in preview; extend to include runnable regeneration steps and exact cell/formula references.
feedback_summary: Deliverables are present, internally consistent, and reproducible given the documented packet-only reconstruction. Main concerns: the normalization formula was reconstructed (needs upstream validation or explicit acceptance of the proxy), record R1 flips under a -5% loss_pct perturbation and thus requires expert review, and reproducibility/provenance can be improved by attaching an executable regeneration artifact and finer-grained traceability (cell-level references). Also note a minor internal workflow metadata inconsistency about which stage performed semantic scoring.
